heading: Fish and Wildlife Service: bulletins
label: 1315 Fish and Wildlife Service: bulletins
text: In addition to the usual number of the bulletins of the Fish and Wildlife Service, five thousand copies shall be printed: one thousand for the Senate, two thousand for the House of Representatives, and two thousand for distribution by the Service.
